programme.title: My Favourite Martian
programme.sub-title: How to Be a Hero Without Really Trying
programme.desc: The O'Hara's have new neighbors, a boy Stevie and his adult sister Jennifer. The foursome go to picnic on Sunset Mountain as Martin needs to get an metal ore called \.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The UCOS team are drawn into a world of immigration loopholes, Albanian gangs and family feuds when they reinvestigate the death of an unidentified male discovered on farmland outside Waltham Forest in 1996, in what appeared to be a crucifixion.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: A couple from New Zealand move into a seaside villa. The wife begins to find the place inexplicably familiar, and has a vision of a murder which took place there.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Viewers from all corners bring their items to be appraised by the show's antiques experts. Are they valuable, priceless items, or will they go home disappointed?

programme.title: Spring In Park Lane
programme.desc: A diamond merchant's niece falls for a footman who just happens to be an impoverished lord in disguise.

programme.title: The Derbyshire Auction House
programme.sub-title: A Rail-y Big Problem in a Loft
programme.desc: Irita Marriott supports a grieving daughter as she parts with a train-set that belonged to her late father. She then sorts through a 30-year-old collection.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Experts invite members of the public to bring along their antiques for examination. The team visit De Montfort Hall in Leicester, and things take a theatrical turn. Items include some antique TV footage and a poster that's a painting.

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: To the vicar's dismay, Hyacinth has volunteered to befriend a small group of senior citizens on a day at the seaside. When one of them gets too friendly, she realizes she has taken on more than she can handle.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Controversial plans to build a supermarket in Elverton-cum-Latterly lead to murder when a man is stabbed to death and the pollution advisor for the site seems to be spending more time with the women of the village than at work. Can Barnaby and Jones discover the truth and learn what is really polluting Elverton?

programme.title: The Spencer Sisters
programme.desc: Darby's ex Lucas hires the Spencer Sisters to look into a series of escalating threats against his fiancée Lindsay.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Jane is astonished to find that an actual witch hunt is occurring in the modern-day town in Salem; Jane speaks her mind on the frustrating situation involving Frankie's old girlfriend, when she comes into town for a visit.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Viewers from all corners bring their items to be appraised by the show's antiques experts. Are they valuable, priceless items, or will they go home disappointed?

programme.title: Creflo Dollar Ministries
programme.sub-title: The Consequences of Being Out of the Will of God (Part3/3)
programme.desc: Hosted by Dr. Creflo and Taffi Dollar, the Changing Your World program explores the power of God in daily Christian life.

programme.title: Spring In Park Lane
programme.desc: A diamond merchant's niece falls for a footman who just happens to be an impoverished lord in disguise.

programme.title: My Favourite Martian
programme.sub-title: How to Be a Hero Without Really Trying
programme.desc: The O'Hara's have new neighbors, a boy Stevie and his adult sister Jennifer. The foursome go to picnic on Sunset Mountain as Martin needs to get an metal ore called \.

programme.title: Gideon's Way
programme.desc: Gideon suspects a housekeeper named Martha Warren is responsible for a string of murders.

programme.title: The Derbyshire Auction House
programme.sub-title: A Rail-y Big Problem in a Loft
programme.desc: Irita Marriott supports a grieving daughter as she parts with a train-set that belonged to her late father. She then sorts through a 30-year-old collection.

programme.title: Gideon's Way
programme.sub-title: How To Retire Without Really Working
programme.desc: Gideon goes after a criminal married couple named Robert and Margaret Gresham.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar Ministries
programme.sub-title: The Consequences of Being Out of the Will of God Pt.2 (Part1/
programme.desc: Hosted by Dr. Creflo and Taffi Dollar, the Changing Your World program explores the power of God in daily Christian life.

programme.title: CruiseAway
programme.desc: Join Derek & Jo from CruiseAway explore incredible cruises from around the world.

programme.title: TV Shop - Home Shopping
programme.desc: Home shopping programme.

programme.title: TV Shop - Home Shopping
programme.desc: Home shopping programme.

programme.title: TV Shop - Home Shopping
programme.desc: Home shopping programme.

programme.title: TV Shop - Home Shopping
programme.desc: Home shopping programme.

programme.title: TV Shop - Home Shopping
programme.desc: Home shopping programme.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Hosted by Alexander Armstrong. In each episode four teams of two contestants attempt to find correct but obscure answers to four rounds of general knowledge questions, with the winning team eligible to compete for the show's cash jackpot.

programme.title: My Favourite Martian
programme.sub-title: Blood is Thicker Than the Martian
programme.desc: Tim's cousin Harvey visits so Martin must hide. They keep Mrs. Brown away as she would speak of Martin. Harvey is a mooch and wants to upgrade from his small town reporter job to where Tim works. The tiny apartment feels cramped to Martin.

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: To the vicar's dismay, Hyacinth has volunteered to befriend a small group of senior citizens on a day at the seaside. When one of them gets too friendly, she realizes she has taken on more than she can handle.

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Hyacinth is concerned that her invitation to the Mayor's fancy dress ball hasn't yet dropped though her letter box. Richard is even more concerned that Hyacinth intends him to attend costumed as Louis XIV in silk trousers.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Controversial plans to build a supermarket in Elverton-cum-Latterly lead to murder when a man is stabbed to death and the pollution advisor for the site seems to be spending more time with the women of the village than at work. Can Barnaby and Jones discover the truth and learn what is really polluting Elverton?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Viewers from all corners bring their items to be appraised by the show's antiques experts. Are they valuable, priceless items, or will they go home disappointed?

programme.title: Swallows And Amazons
programme.desc: Four children, seeking to escape the boredom of a summer holiday, vie for ownership of an island in the middle of a lake, while contending with a mysterious stranger and his boat, as they learn about survival, friendship and keeping one's nerve.

programme.title: The Derbyshire Auction House
programme.desc: Whilst sorting through an antique shop, Irita finds a Uranium glass vase. Then, she helps two brothers sell their late parent's antique collection.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Viewers from all corners bring their items to be appraised by the show's antiques experts. Are they valuable, priceless items, or will they go home disappointed?

programme.title: RBT
programme.desc: Follow the police units for a unique behind-the-scenes look at RBT patrols testing for alcohol and drug affected drivers.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Doctors Jonathan Papson and Emma West worry a mechanic could lose his crushed arm. Dr Luke De La Rue's decision not to ride a bike in the city is reinforced when treating a cyclist with a horrifically mangled ankle after being hit by a car.

programme.title: A&E: Crash Scene Emergency
programme.desc: Filmed at one of the country's largest trauma units, University Hospital Coventry, following medical teams working against the clock to save the lives of people injured in traffic collisions.

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: A family of victims from a house fire is rushed to Gaffney, as Lenox fights to save two sisters injured in an all-night rave turned tragedy.

programme.title: Forensics: Murder Scene
programme.desc: A recycling plant in Yorkshire is the scene of a gruesome discovery when an intact human foot is found among the waste. Who does it belong to? Is it a murder case? And who's responsible?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Viewers from all corners bring their items to be appraised by the show's antiques experts. Are they valuable, priceless items, or will they go home disappointed?

programme.title: Creflo Dollar Ministries
programme.sub-title: The Consequences of Being Out of the Will of God Pt.2 (Part1/3)
programme.desc: Hosted by Dr. Creflo and Taffi Dollar, the Changing Your World program explores the power of God in daily Christian life.

programme.title: Swallows And Amazons
programme.desc: Four children, seeking to escape the boredom of a summer holiday, vie for ownership of an island in the middle of a lake, while contending with a mysterious stranger and his boat, as they learn about survival, friendship and keeping one's nerve.

programme.title: My Favourite Martian
programme.sub-title: Blood is Thicker Than the Martian
programme.desc: Tim's cousin Harvey visits so Martin must hide. They keep Mrs. Brown away as she would speak of Martin. Harvey is a mooch and wants to upgrade from his small town reporter job to where Tim works. The tiny apartment feels cramped to Martin.

programme.title: Gideon's Way
programme.sub-title: How To Retire Without Really Working
programme.desc: Gideon goes after a criminal married couple named Robert and Margaret Gresham.

programme.title: The Derbyshire Auction House
programme.desc: Whilst sorting through an antique shop, Irita finds a Uranium glass vase. Then, she helps two brothers sell their late parent's antique collection.

programme.title: Gideon's Way
programme.desc: A man disappears after winning the football pools, leading people to assume he has left his wife - but she is convinced he has been murdered.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar Ministries
programme.sub-title: The Consequences of Being Out of the Will of God Pt.2 (Part2/
programme.desc: Hosted by Dr. Creflo and Taffi Dollar, the Changing Your World program explores the power of God in daily Christian life.

programme.title: CruiseAway
programme.desc: Join Derek & Jo from CruiseAway explore incredible cruises from around the world.

programme.title: TV Shop - Home Shopping
programme.desc: Home shopping programme.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Hosted by Alexander Armstrong. In each episode four teams of two contestants attempt to find correct but obscure answers to four rounds of general knowledge questions, with the winning team eligible to compete for the show's cash jackpot.

programme.title: My Favourite Martian
programme.desc: To prove that money left to a cat rightfully belongs to an orphanage, Tim and Martin hold a séance.

programme.title: Antiques Downunder
programme.desc: The Antiques DownUnder team visits St Peter's Cultural Heritage Centre where an historic building has found new life; Claudia catches up with auctioneer Marc du Plessis.

programme.title: Antiques Downunder
programme.desc: Claudia has a peek inside the private wardrobe of globe-trotting fashion anthropologist Charlotte Smith; Gregory visits Artlab Australia for some tips on textile conservation; Claudia shares some favourite photographs from her collection.

programme.title: Bonnie Prince Charlie
programme.desc: Exiled prince Charles Edward Stuart raises a force of loyal Scottish followers to seize the English crown in this epic costume drama set in the 1700s.
